sentences.arabic: كَانَ سَامِي يَشْعُرُ بِالْخَوْفِ حِينَ كَانَ وَحِيدًا فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Sami se bojao kada je bio sam kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Sami used to feel afraid when he was alone at home.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَسْمَعُ أَصْوَاتًا وَيَتَخَيَّلُ أَشْيَاءَ مُخِيفَةً.
sentences.translation: Čuo bi zvukove i zamišljao strašne stvari.
sentences.translationEn: He would hear sounds and imagine scary things.

sentences.arabic: أَضَاءَ الأَنْوَارَ وَشَغَّلَ الرَّادِيوَ لِيَشْعُرَ بِالأَنْسِ.
sentences.translation: Upalio je svjetla i uključio radio da se osjeća prijatno.
sentences.translationEn: He turned on the lights and the radio to feel comfortable.

sentences.arabic: شَيْئًا فَشَيْئًا تَعَلَّمَ أَنْ يَكُونَ وَحِيدًا بِلَا خَوْفٍ.
sentences.translation: Polako je naučio biti sam bez straha.
sentences.translationEn: Little by little he learned to be alone without fear.
